description_long: This is a modern office desk setup featuring a rectangular wooden tabletop supported by four black metal legs. On the desk, there are three computer monitors arranged in a dual-horizontal and single-vertical configuration, with a black desktop computer tower positioned to one side. The workspace includes a black ergonomic office chair with wheels, several colorful sticky note pads, a white notepad, a red coffee mug, and two upright file binders. The desk surface is smooth and uncluttered, with all items neatly organized for productivity. The overall design is functional and professional, suitable for a high-tech or administrative environment.
description: A modern office desk with a wooden top, black metal legs, triple monitor setup, computer tower, and an ergonomic office chair, accessorized with office supplies.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black office chair, the desk's wooden surface, and the computer monitors with the desktop tower on the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual-horizontal and single-vertical monitor arrangement, chair centered behind the desk, and organized office supplies.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the chair, monitors, and colorful sticky notes on the desk's left edge.
description_view_3: Rear view from behind the chair, clearly showing the monitor setup, computer tower, file binders, and desk accessories.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the chair and monitors, with the computer tower and file binders to the right and left, respectively; this is the functional front of the desk.
